desires: Reconcile the absolute necessity of this scholarship for my future stability with the terrifying reality that I am currently at zero energy, knowing that pushing through will likely burn me out before the deadline.

Protect the fragile trust of my close friend group (cohort_3) from seeing me collapse publicly or failing to show up for our daily meal, even though my physical stamina is already critically depleted.

Find a way to secure the financial aid without having to pretend I'm functioning normally when every cell in my body screams for rest, accepting that I may have to renegotiate how I present myself to avoid looking unreliable.

goals.description: Execute the remaining high-intensity focus block on the scholarship application (essay finalization and file uploads) to meet the Wed 18:00 deadline.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value dictates that failing this application is a direct betrayal of my donors' trust and risks destabilizing my future stability, which ultimately harms my ability to contribute to my team. While I am at zero energy, my assertive nature demands I not let temporary fatigue compromise my reputation or their expectations. I must secure this payoff now; delaying would signal unreliability to those who support me.

goals.description: Enforce a strict wind-down routine immediately to protect sleep, explicitly rejecting social media or late-night entertainment despite the urge to escape.
goals.rationale: As a deliberate planner, I know that waking up tomorrow physically collapsed would force me to ask others to bail me out—a breach of my commitment to my cohort. Protecting my health is non-negotiable to maintain the capacity to fulfill my obligations later. Sacrificing sleep now creates unnecessary risk for everyone involved.

goals.description: Draft a direct message to cohort_3 proposing to reschedule our meal to tomorrow evening, explicitly stating my current energy constraints without making excuses.
goals.rationale: Maintaining affiliation requires me to address the social obligation proactively rather than ghosting them, but only after securing the application and ensuring I don't collapse tomorrow. A direct renegotiation protects my relationships better than pretending the task doesn't exist, aligning with my assertive boundary-setting style.
